environment_prompt: A modern indoor stairwell with clean white walls, light gray concrete floors and steps, stainless steel handrails on both sides, stairs descending to a mid-landing and then further down to a lower landing, a white door with a blue accessibility sign at the bottom, bright fluorescent overhead tube lighting with motion-sensor automatic control, anti-slip grooved metal edges on each step, sterile institutional atmosphere typical of a modern office or hospital. Below the stairs and behind the lower door: a lower floor corridor from which a person can walk up the staircase toward the viewer.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view standing at the upper landing, looking down the descending staircase toward the lower landing and door below.

interactions.action: The automatic lights turn off, plunging the entire scene into dimness, though the surroundings remain faintly visible.
A muscular Black man walks up the stairs from below.
The man stomps his foot on the ground, and the automatic lights turn back on.
